scripts.sandbox:init: pnpm --filter project-arch build && tmp="$(mktemp -d /tmp/project-arch-sandbox-XXXXXX)" && echo "Sandbox: $tmp" && mkdir -p .sandbox && ln -sfn "$tmp" .sandbox/current && (command -v code >/dev/null 2>&1 && code "$tmp" || true) && cd "$tmp" && node /home/misstitank3/project-arch-system/packages/project-arch/dist/cli.js init && node /home/misstitank3/project-arch-system/packages/project-arch/dist/cli.js check && echo "Sandbox ready at $tmp"
scripts.sandbox:smoke: pnpm --filter project-arch build && tmp="$(mktemp -d /tmp/project-arch-sandbox-XXXXXX)" && echo "Sandbox smoke: $tmp" && mkdir -p .sandbox && ln -sfn "$tmp" .sandbox/current && cd "$tmp" && node /home/misstitank3/project-arch-system/packages/project-arch/dist/cli.js init && node /home/misstitank3/project-arch-system/packages/project-arch/dist/cli.js check && echo "Sandbox smoke passed at $tmp"
